steps.title: Identify the required comparison
steps.content: The student wants to compare the hardness of talc and topaz specifically—this is the goal any effective choice must accomplish.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly accomplishes this goal
steps.content: Choice D directly compares talc and topaz using the Mohs principle from the notes—since topaz can scratch talc, topaz is harder. Choices A and C involve different mineral pairs, while B describes how the scale works generally rather than directly comparing these two. That matches choice D — D is correct.
